ModMetaData.name: HSK RN Weapon Router
ModMetaData.author: CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
Reroutes all craftable weapons to the three Rimmu-Nation² workbenches based on weapon category.
ROUTING: - Pistols / Revolvers / SMGs / PDWs / Shotguns → RNBench_CQB - Assault rifles / Bolt actions / DMRs / AMRs / Sniper rifles → RNBench_LBW - LMGs / HMGs / Launchers / Spacer weapons / Grenades → RNBench_HeavyWeapons - Anything else with a recipeMaker that doesn't match a category → RNBench_LBW (fallback)
Replace mode: original recipeUsers list is removed and replaced with the matching RN bench.
SOFT DEPENDENCY: This mod requires [RH2] Rimmu-Nation² - Weapons to provide the RN benches. If RH2 RN²-Weapons is not installed or disabled, this mod gracefully no-ops — every patch operation is wrapped with MayRequire="CP.RimmuNation.2.Weapons" so it only runs when RH2 is loaded. Weapons keep their original benches when RH2 is absent.
Load AFTER all weapon mods.
